title: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Cummins (CMI) have what it takes?

title: Cummins Inc. and Tata Motors Strengthen Their 30-Year Alliance to Power a Cleaner India With Low- to Zero-Emissions Technologies for Mobility Solutions
text: COLUMBUS, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Global power leader Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) announced today that it has signed a definitive agreement with Tata Motors Limited (TML), to manufacture a range of low- to zero-emissions technology products in India over the next few years. The definitive agreement was signed by Jennifer Rumsey, President and Chief Executive Officer, Cummins Inc., and Girish Wagh, Executive Director, Tata Motors, at Cummins Inc. headquarters in Columbus, Indiana, USA. Senior offici.

title: 5 Analyst Favorite ‘Strong Buy' Value Stocks With Dependable Dividends

title: Walmart Teams up With Cummins and Chevron to Debut First 15-liter Renewable Natural Gas Engine on the Road in North America
text: BENTONVILLE, Ark. & SAN RAMON, Calif. & COLUMBUS, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Walmart is reaching a new destination in its goal for a zero-emissions transportation fleet with the debut of the first North American—and the first of five— 15-liter compressed natural gas engine that will be incorporated into Walmart's private fleet. The X15N™ engine is supplied by Cummins and fueled by Chevron with compressed natural gas (CNG) linked to renewable natural gas.

title: Cummins To Invest Over $1 Billion In Upgrading Its Facilities
text: Cummins announced that in addition to recent investments in Fridley, the company is investing over $1 billion across its U.S. engine manufacturing network in Indiana, North Carolina, and New York. The post Cummins To Invest Over $1 Billion In Upgrading Its Facilities appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Cummins plans $1B+ investment in engine plants, hydrogen equipment
text: Cummins Inc. will spend more than $1 billion to modernize engine plants in three states and invest in hydrogen production equipment in Minnesota, the company said Monday. The projects had previously been announced.

title: Cummins Inc. (CMI) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
text: Cummins (CMI) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

title: Cummins investing $1 billion in plant upgrades as Biden plans visit Monday
text: Cummins Inc. CMI, +2.05% said Monday it will invest more than $1 billion in its U.S. engine manufacturing network in North Carolina, Indiana and New York. The announcement comes as President Joe Biden is scheduled to visit a Cummins plant in Fridley, Minn.

title: Cummins Announces Investments of more than $1 billion Across U.S. Manufacturing Network
text: COLUMBUS, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #cummins--On Monday, April 3, President Biden will visit Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) in Fridley, Minnesota (USA) as part of his Administration's Investing in America tour. During the visit, President Biden will discuss how his Investing in America agenda is supporting manufacturing, innovation and a clean energy economy, as well as creating good-paying jobs in communities like Fridley and across the country.
